# Documentation

## Prose and specs (human-written)

- **`derivation_verification.md`** – Verification of derive scripts against metadata and DHS/Coordinating Center conventions. Not generated by scripts.

## Generated catalogs (do not edit by hand)

- **`*_metadata.json`** – Variable catalogs (name, label, value labels, pct_missing) for raw SAS datasets. Produced by `scripts/01_metadata/generate_variable_metadata.R`, `scripts/01_metadata/generate_coir61fl_metadata.R`, and `scripts/01_metadata/generate_coir72fl_metadata.R`. Regenerate after updating raw data or metadata logic.
